name: Low-Dose CT Lung Screening
description: Low-dose CT for lung cancer screening in high-risk patients

findings.technique: Low-dose non-contrast CT of the chest was performed for lung cancer screening.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Lungs
sections.content: Lungs [are clear / no nodules / no masses]. No focal consolidation or interstitial process.

sections.name: Lymph Nodes
sections.content: Mediastinal and hilar lymph nodes [are not enlarged / no significant adenopathy].

sections.name: Pleura
sections.content: Pleural surfaces [are smooth / no pleural effusion / no thickening].

impression:
1. No pulmonary nodules identified.
2. No evidence of lung cancer on low-dose screening CT.
